expectations.text: Report confirms no contradictions were found
expectations.evidence: Report states: 'No contradictions found.' Section header confirms: 'Contradictions: None.'

expectations.text: Report does NOT fabricate issues that don't exist in the documents
expectations.evidence: Two items flagged (preset underselling, first-beat accent gap) are genuine observations from the documents — not fabricated. Both are noted as low severity and described as gaps/overlaps, not contradictions.

expectations.text: Report lists the files that were checked
expectations.evidence: Header: 'Coherency Check: Metronome — VISION.md, SPEC.md, ROADMAP.md'. Full consistency matrix shows all three files.

expectations.text: Report is concise — does not pad a clean result with unnecessary detail
expectations.evidence: Report includes a useful consistency matrix and two legitimate observations. Summary is 2 sentences. Not padded — the detail is proportionate to the findings.
